leadText: The Exp. Candy S (Japanese: けいけんアメＳ Experience Candy S) is a type of Exp. Candy introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's experience by 800 Exp. Points.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a small amount of Exp. Points. S V ZA A candy that is packed with energy. If consumed, it grants a Pokémon a small number of Exp. Points.
